notes: Factual descriptions of investment vehicle structures and terms compiled from issuer disclosures. Educational display only; nothing here is a recommendation. Fee and liquidity facts are hand-curated from the cited sources and re-verified on the curation cadence in the README.

wrappers.name: ARK Venture Fund

fees.description: Total annual expense ratio per issuer materials; verify current figure in the prospectus at the source URL.

liquidity.terms: Interval fund: no exchange listing; quarterly repurchase offers of approximately 5% of outstanding shares at NAV. Purchases available through participating brokerages at NAV daily; redemptions only via the quarterly windows.

wrappers.private_exposure_notes: Venture portfolio including OpenAI, Anthropic, Stripe and other late-stage private companies; its SpaceX position became publicly traded stock at the June 2026 SPCX listing. See live holdings block.

nav_per_share.source: Fund transacts at NAV; NAV via Yahoo Finance quote

wrappers.name: Destiny Tech100

fees.description: Management fee per registration statement; see the fund's N-2 filings on EDGAR for the current fee table.

liquidity.terms: Exchange-listed closed-end fund: shares trade intraday on NYSE at market price, which can differ substantially from NAV in either direction. No redemption right at NAV.

wrappers.private_exposure_notes: Portfolio of roughly two dozen late-stage private companies; SpaceX and OpenAI have been its largest disclosed positions. Holdings and NAV are disclosed in SEC filings (N-PORT, 424B3 supplements).

nav_per_share.source: Destiny Tech100 prospectus supplement (424B3) filed 2026-05-12: "our net asset value as of March 31, 2026, is $24.56 per share".

wrappers.name: ERShares Private-Public Crossover ETF

fees.description: Ongoing management fee stated by the issuer (0.75% annually).

liquidity.terms: ETF: trades intraday on Nasdaq with standard T+1 settlement. Private exposure is held via an SPV inside the fund; the fund itself remains exchange-liquid.

wrappers.private_exposure_notes: SPV exposure to SpaceX was 44.65% of the fund as of 2026-03-31 per the issuer's published Top 10 Holdings — disclosed pre-IPO; SpaceX has traded as SPCX since 2026-06-12.
wrappers.nav_note: The issuer publishes NAV and premium/discount information on its site and in filings, but not in a machine-readable feed this pipeline can cite; premium_to_nav is therefore marked unavailable rather than computed against a stale figure. ETF creation/redemption arbitrage typically keeps market price near NAV.

wrappers.name: SuRo Capital

fees.description: Internally managed BDC: no external management fee; fund-level operating expenses are reported in its SEC filings (see 10-K/10-Q).

liquidity.terms: Exchange-listed BDC: shares trade intraday on Nasdaq at market price, which can differ substantially from NAV. No redemption right at NAV.

wrappers.private_exposure_notes: Venture-stage portfolio; OpenAI (via SPVs), CoreWeave-adjacent and other late-stage names have featured among its largest positions per quarterly filings.

nav_per_share.source: SuRo Capital Form 10-Q for the quarter ended 2026-03-31 (filed 2026-05-06), condensed consolidated statements of assets and liabilities: net asset value per share $14.24.

wrappers.name: Fundrise Innovation Fund

fees.description: Flat annual management fee stated by the issuer (1.85%).

liquidity.terms: Non-listed fund offered through the Fundrise platform: purchases at NAV; liquidity via periodic repurchase offers under the fund's repurchase program, not guaranteed. See offering circular.

wrappers.private_exposure_notes: Disclosed portfolio has included OpenAI, Anthropic, Anduril, Databricks and Canva per the issuer's public fund page.
wrappers.nav_note: Share price (NAV) is published to platform account holders; there is no public machine-readable NAV feed to cite, so NAV and premium_to_nav are marked unavailable here.
